ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator responsible for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "regulatory_approval" TEXT /* Regulatory approval status (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "trial_description" TEXT /* Description of the trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the trial is conducted */,
  "primary_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary researcher responsible for the trial */,
  "trial_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the clinical trial (e.g., Phase I, Phase II, Phase III) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_primary_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the participant is enrolled in */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the participant is part of */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "nyha" INTEGER /* NYHA class of the participant */,
  "wt" REAL /* Weight of the participant */,
  "cono" TEXT /* Concomitant medication of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was enrolled in the trial */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date the participant withdrew from the trial (if applicable) */,
  "withdrawal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for participant withdrawal (if applicable) */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant's consent (e.g., given, pending, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dose" REAL /* Dose of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of medication administration */,
  "form" TEXT /* Form of the medication (e.g., tablet, injection) */,
  "strength" REAL /* Strength of the medication */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant receiving the treatment */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication being administered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "dose" REAL /* Dose of the medication administered */,
  "administration_route" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., oral, intravenous) */,
  "administered_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who administered the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the outcome belongs to */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "outcome_value" REAL /* Value of the outcome */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was measured */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the outcome */,
  "measured_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who measured the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adverse_events" (
  "adverse_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adverse event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the adverse event belongs to */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the adverse event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the adverse event occurred */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the adverse event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of adverse event (e.g., serious, non-serious) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the adverse event */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the adverse event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adverse_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concomitant_medications" (
  "concomitant_medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concomitant medication */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant taking the concomitant medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the concomitant medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the concomitant medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the concomitant medication */,
  "prescribed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who prescribed the concomitant medication */,
  "prescription_reason" TEXT /* Reason for prescribing the concomitant medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concomitant_medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concomitant_medications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratory_results" (
  "laboratory_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory result */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the laboratory result belongs to */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory test */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the laboratory result */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the laboratory result was measured */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of laboratory test (e.g., blood test, urine test) */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the test result */,
  "measured_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who measured the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laboratory_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "researcher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the trial (e.g., principal investigator, co-investigator) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., hospital, university) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "site_location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant making the visit */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site the participant is visiting */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., screening, follow-up) */,
  "visit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the visit (e.g., routine check-up, follow-up) */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Notes taken during the visit */,
  "attended_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who attended the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., informed consent, protocol) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the document */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who last updated the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
